Memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hot context, auto-injected into prompts"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TTL (default 24h) + max 10,000 items"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Long-term consolidated storage"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None (append-only with 9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Capability"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Hindsight strategy"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Conflict detection"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 mark old facts tracking"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cross-machine sharing"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 same-machine SQLite only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 HTTP API on port 8888"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multi-tenancy"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 session/global binary scope"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 HindClaw adds JWT/API key auth + per-tenant schemas"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mental models"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 user-curated summaries with delta updates"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graph traversal"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u26a0\\ufe0f TripleStore only (S-P-O queries)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 entity link expansion + co-occurrence tracking"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"OpenClaw integration"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c Not yet exists"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes integration"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Native b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Honest Trade-Off"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is simpler, faster, lighter. Hindsight is smarter, more sophisticated, more complete."}]}]
d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Use Mnemosyne if you want:"}]
e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["The simplest possible deployment: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Fastest recall latency (no HTTP, no PyTorch overhead)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Raw-text storage without structured fact extraction"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Single-machine, single-user operation"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Something that \"just works\" without containers"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Full control over the memory model"}],"\n"]}]
f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Use Hindsight Self-Hosted if you want:"}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Entity resolution (\"this person is the same as that person\")"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Automatic fact extraction from raw text"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Cross-machine memory sharing"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Multi-tenant memory banks"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Temporal reasoning (\"what happened last week?\")"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Sophisticated retrieval with reranking"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Docker + PostgreSQL complexity is acceptable"}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","hr",null,{}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Concrete Scenario: 100-Turn Chat"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"At turn 90, the agent needs to recall a fact from turn 10."}]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hindsight path:"}]}]
15:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["HTTP POST to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"localhost:8888"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"4-way parallel recall with RRF fusion"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Cross-encoder reranks results"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Returns structured facts with confidence"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency:"}]," ~50-200ms"]}],"\n"]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne path:"}]}]
17:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Direct Python function call"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec vector similarity + FTS5 keyword match"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Hybrid score with recency decay"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Returns raw text memories"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency:"}]," ~2-10ms for 10K corpus"]}],"\n"]}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Where Mnemosyne wins:"}]," 5-20\\u00d7 faster, ~100MB total footprint vs ~500MB+, no container orchestration."]}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Where Hindsight wins:"}]," Better recall quality, structured facts with provenance, entity-aware retrieval."]}]

1c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne"}]

22:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's published \"0.076ms vs 38ms\" comparison compares ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"in-process SQLite"}]," to ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"HTTP API roundtrips"}],". That is not apples-to-apples for semantic retrieval."]}]
